name: Zhijian "James" Chen
reason: for the discovery of the cGAS enzyme that senses DNA and triggers immune responses

name: Joel Habener / Lotte Bjerre Knudsen / Svetlana Mojsov
reason: for the discovery and development of GLP-1-based drugs that revolutionized treatment of obesity and diabetes

name: Demis Hassabis / John M. Jumper
reason: for the development of AlphaFold, an AI system for predicting protein structures

name: James G. Fujimoto / David Huang / Eric A. Swanson
reason: for the invention of optical coherence tomography (OCT) for imaging the retina and coronary arteries

name: Richard O. Hynes / Erkki Ruoslahti / Timothy A. Springer
reason: for discoveries concerning integrins, the cell adhesion molecules that regulate cell movement and communication

name: Yusuke Nakamura / Anne-Lise Børresen-Dale / Mary-Claire King
reason: for discoveries that established BRCA1/BRCA2 as genes that cause hereditary breast and ovarian cancer

name: Quarraisha Abdool Karim / Salim S. Abdool Karim
reason: for demonstrating that an antiretroviral drug can prevent heterosexual transmission of HIV

name: The International AIDS Vaccine Initiative / Anthony S. Fauci
reason: for contributions to HIV vaccine research and the global fight against infectious diseases
